text.message: Can someone help me plow red?
If they get that spot it’s over
I’ll need a wood, brick, and sheep
OJ I can plow red with this
I’m last place since the start lol
The rich can’t keep getting richer
Stealing from me in last is kinda insane no?
How are you not the rob when you could’ve won with road right now?
No one trade you thr game lol
Just use it i have no where to go
